title: Without Pity
writer: Federico Fellini, Alberto Lattuada, Ettore Maria Margadonna
actors: Carla Del Poggio, John Kitzmiller, Giulietta Masina
plot: An African-American soldier stationing in Italy refuses to make a deal with local gangsters. However, when a girl he loves turns desperately to prostitution, Jerry is forced to change his mind to save her.
